seoTitle: Fitzgerald vs Flintstone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fitzgerald and Flintstone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fitzgerald and Flintstone.
heading: Fitzgerald vs Flintstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fitzgerald, Tasmania and Flintstone, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Flintstone has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Fitzgerald (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fitzgerald or Flintstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fitzgerald has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Flintstone scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fitzgerald scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Flintstone scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fitzgerald or Flintstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Flintstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
